narrative: Expanded the olca integration by adding a Python helper and accompanying Node script. Users can now check their olca installation via `npm run olca-info` which prints version details. Documentation updated to mention this command, further bridging Node and Python workflows in WODE.
user_input: Come on, you are far from impressing me here....
scene_before: WODE exposed olca only through a CLI help command.
scene_after: Developers can now inspect olca details with an extra script, enabling deeper experimentation between Node and Python tooling.
